name: neruva-mcp
summary: MCP server for Neruva agent memory + reasoning substrate. v0.22 adds the AUTO-PILOT surface: agent_route_intent_prompt (Layer 2 -- 18-pattern intent classifier) + agent_reflect_prompt (Layer 3 -- self-curates substrate from recent turns). Combined with auto-extract on records_ingest (Layer 1), the agent uses the full substrate without prompting. Plus Records, 5-engine KG, federated agent_remember/recall/context, Pearl do-operator, HD analogy, CBR, ToM, EFE, rule induction, replay, code_kg_* navigation.
